nodes.name: Search Arbeitnow Germany/EU
nodes.notes: Berlin/Germany-first public job API. No API key required. Useful for English-speaking Germany and Europe jobs.

nodes.name: Build Upwork Poll URLs
nodes.notes: Set UPWORK_POLL_URLS in docker/.env. Use saved Upwork search URLs or an allowed intermediary search/alert URL. For robust extraction, replace this branch with Apify later.

nodes.name: Append to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Create a sheet named Opportunities with headers matching docs/google-sheets-setup.md, then replace the sheet ID.

nodes.name: Create Zoho Deal
nodes.notes: After importing, connect a Zoho CRM credential and map custom fields from docs/zoho-crm-setup.md.

parameters.content:
Berlin-first MVP flow:
1. Pull recent Germany/EU jobs from Arbeitnow.
2. Poll configured Upwork search URLs for freelance lead links.
3. Normalize and dedupe per source.
4. Score with OpenAI.
5. Append all results to Google Sheets.
6. Push score >= 70 to Zoho CRM.
